zh.lifeSummary: 當Helen Delves於1400年出生在英國爾維布波瑞時，她的父親John De Delves II24歲，母親Phillippa Mainwaring16歲。她和Robert Sheffield至少有1個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1490年在英國越可爾巴特維其可享年90歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Helen Delves于1400年出生在英国爾維布波瑞时，她的父亲John De Delves II24岁，母亲Phillippa Mainwaring16岁。她和Robert Sheffield至少有1个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于1490年在英国越可爾巴特維其可享年90岁。

nameMeanings.name: Delves
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: variant of Delve , with plural or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Delve
meanings: English: locative name, nickname from Middle English delf, delphe, delve ‘pit, quarry, canal, ditch’, denoting someone who lived by a pit, quarry, or excavation, or, in some instances, a ditcher, digger, or quarrier (Middle English delver(er)); compare William le Deluer, 1230 in Pipe Rolls (Somerset). Lettice atte Delue, 1357, cited below, is probably to be associated with John Delvere, 1359 in Colchester Court Rolls (Essex).

nameMeanings.name: Helen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: vernacular form of the name (Greek Hēlēnē) borne in classical legend by a famous beauty, wife of Menelaus, whose seizure by the Trojan prince Paris sparked off the Trojan War. Her name is of uncertain origin; it may be connected with a word meaning ‘ray’ or ‘sunbeam’ compare Greek hēlios ‘sun’. It has sometimes been taken as connected with the Greek word meaning ‘Greek’, Hellēn, but this is doubtful. In the early Christian period the name was borne by the mother of the Emperor Constantine, who is now usually known by the Latin version of her name, Helena. She is credited with having found the True Cross in Jerusalem. She was born in about 248 , probably in Bithynia. However, in medieval England it was believed that she had been born in Britain, which greatly increased the popularity of the name there.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Helen Delves was born in 1400, in Wybunbury, Cheshire, England, her father, John De Delves II, was 24 and her mother, Phillippa Mainwaring, was 16. She had at least 1 son and 2 daughters with Robert Sheffield. She died in 1490, in Butterwick, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 90.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Helen Delves est née en 1400, à Wybunbury, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, John De Delves II, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Phillippa Mainwaring, avait 16 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles avec Robert Sheffield. Elle est décédée en 1490, à Butterwick, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 90 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Helen Delves 1400 in Wybunbury, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John De Delves II 24 und ihre Mutter Phillippa Mainwaring 16. Sie hatte mit Robert Sheffield mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1490 im Alter von 90 Jahren in Butterwick, Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Helen Delves è nata il nel 1400 nel Wybunbury, Cheshire, England, sua padre, John De Delves II, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Phillippa Mainwaring, aveva 16 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie con Robert Sheffield. Morì nel 1490, nel Butterwick, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 90 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Helen Delvesが1400年にイギリスチェシュアイアウイブンブリーで生まれた時，父John De Delves IIは24歳，母Phillippa Mainwaringは16歳であった。彼女はRobert Sheffieldとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1490年にイギリスヨークシュアイアブッテルウィックで90歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Helen Delves(이)가 1400년 영국 체실르 윈이버버이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John De Delves II(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Phillippa Mainwaring(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 Robert Sheffield(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1490년 영국 요르크실르 버터윅에서 90세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Helen Delves nasceu em 1400, em Wybunbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John De Delves II, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Phillippa Mainwaring, tinha 16 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas com Robert Sheffield. Ela faleceu em 1490, em Butterwick, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 90 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Helen Delves родилась в 1400 г. в местности вибунбури, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени John De Delves II было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Phillippa Mainwaring, 16. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери от Robert Sheffield. Она умерла в 1490 г. в местности буттирвикк, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 90 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Helen Delves nació en 1400, en Wybunbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John De Delves II, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Phillippa Mainwaring, tenía 16 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas con Robert Sheffield. Murió en 1490, en Butterwick, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 90 años.
